name: Missing Team
description: A Bureau investigation team has gone missing in the field, leaving behind a trail of evidence that points toward an early suspect for the Mastermind.

events.name: Missing Team Reported
events.description: A Bureau field team has failed to check in. Their last known position was deep in hostile territory.

events.name: Evidence Trail Found
events.description: The team's field notes have surfaced. They were close to identifying the Mastermind before they vanished.

events.name: Suspect Identified
events.description: The trail leads to a named individual with ties to the Mastermind's faction. The Bureau wants them found.
